ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lessons" (
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson */,
  "lesson_name" TEXT /* Name of the lesson */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* URL of the lesson page */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video tutorial */,
  "slides_url" TEXT /* URL of the slide presentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lesson content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the lesson in minutes */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the lesson */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the lesson within the course */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version to which the lesson belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., learner, instructor) */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user enrolled in the course */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lesson_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the user completed the lesson */,
  "progress_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of the lesson completed by the user */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent by the user on the lesson in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_progress_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson being feedback on */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "helpful_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the feedback was helpful */,
  "reply" TEXT /* Reply from the instructor to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date when the bookmark was created */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position or timestamp in the video where the bookmark was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the course materials */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in the version */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the version is the current version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lesson_versions" (
  "lesson_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lesson version association */,
  "lesson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lesson */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the lesson */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the lesson was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lesson_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES course_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lesson_versions_lesson_id FOREIGN KEY ("lesson_id") REFERENCES lessons ("lesson_id")
)
